parameters.subject: =Meeting Confirmed: {{ $('Extract AI Selection').first().json.meeting_type }} [{{ $('Extract AI Selection').first().json.booking_id }}]
parameters.message:
=

Meeting Confirmed

Hi {{ $('Extract AI Selection').first().json.contact_name }},

Your meeting has been scheduled:

  • Type: {{ $('Extract AI Selection').first().json.meeting_type }}
  • Date/Time: {{ $('Extract AI Selection').first().json.event_start }}
  • Duration: {{ $('Extract AI Selection').first().json.duration_min }} minutes
  • Booking ID: {{ $('Extract AI Selection').first().json.booking_id }}

A calendar invite has been sent to your email. See you there!

Best regards,
AnyVision Media

AnyVision Media - ian@anyvisionmedia.com

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({success: true, booking_id: $("Extract AI Selection").first().json.booking_id, event_start: $("Extract AI Selection").first().json.event_start, event_end: $("Extract AI Selection").first().json.event_end}) }}
